title: Particle Heaven
description: Particle Heaven's aim is to change all aspects of particles and functions throughout the game don't believe us? check it out
body:
+ What dose this modpack add -

Changes all aspects of particles throughtout the game from basic caveman torches, to advanced technonolgy like the command block

+ Why our mod? -

Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -

No Optimizations mods were added if you wish to add so just make sure to unlock the modpack
